---
title: "My First Data Analysis as a CS Student"
author: "Palesa Nomfundo Ndhlangamandla"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 🌍 Introduction

Hi, I’m Palesa, a Computer Science student exploring the world of data and technology.

In this project, I am analyzing a simple dataset to understand how data works and how we can extract insights from it.

```{r cars}
summary(mtcars)
data(mtcars)


head(mtcars)
```

# Plot: MPG vs Horsepower

plot(mtcars$hp, mtcars$mpg, main = "Horsepower vs Fuel Efficiency", xlab = "Horsepower", ylab = "Miles per Gallon")

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
